B2B Pitch - NotebookLM Prompt

NotebookLM prompt for generating the HeyZack B2B investor pitch deck

NotebookLM Prompt: HeyZack B2B Pitch Deck

Instructions for NotebookLM

Create a 12-slide investor pitch presentation for HeyZack, an AI-powered building automation company. The presentation should be professional, data-driven, and compelling for venture capital investors and strategic partners.

Brand Styling Requirements

Colors (use consistently throughout):

  • Primary Blue: #243984 — Headlines, key data points, trust elements
  • Primary Pink: #E82F89 — CTAs, accents, emphasis moments
  • Gradient: Blue to Pink — Title slide, closing slide, key moments
  • Background: Light grey (#F8FAFC) or white with subtle texture

Typography:

  • Headlines: Bold, modern sans-serif, 48-64px
  • Body: Clean sans-serif, 18-24px
  • Data/Stats: Extra bold, 72-120px for impact numbers

Visual Style:

  • Clean, minimal, premium tech aesthetic
  • Generous whitespace
  • Icons: Outline style, 2px stroke
  • Charts: Simple, brand-colored, large data labels

Slide-by-Slide Content

SLIDE 1: Title

Headline: HeyZack Subhead: AI Automation for Residential & Commercial Buildings Visual: Centered logo on gradient background (blue to pink) Bottom text: “The Future of Building Intelligence”

SLIDE 2: The Problem

Headline: Building Automation is Broken

Content: Property managers face an impossible choice: $85,000+ for enterprise systems with vendor lock-in, or fragmented consumer devices that don’t scale.

Key Statistics (display prominently):

  • $85K — Average traditional BMS installation
  • 7+ apps — Typical fragmented setup
  • $15K/year — Maintenance contract fees
  • 40% — Buildings with no automation

Visual: Icon representing complexity/frustration

SLIDE 3: Market Opportunity

Headline: A $180B Market Ready for Disruption

Market Size (show as concentric circles or bar chart):

  • TAM: $180B — Global building automation
  • SAM: $45B — Commercial property management
  • SOM: $4.5B — Mid-market US/EU properties

Growth: 12% CAGR through 2030

SLIDE 4: Our Solution

Headline: AI-Powered Automation at 95% Lower Cost

Key Value Props (4 bullet points):

  1. $5K per building vs. $85K traditional (95% reduction)
  2. One dashboard for unlimited properties
  3. Genuine AI learning, not just scheduling
  4. DIY installation — no contractors needed

Visual: Product hero image with gradient glow

SLIDE 5: How It Works

Headline: Simple. Scalable. Intelligent.

4-Step Process (horizontal flow):

  1. Deploy — DIY install in 2-4 hours per building
  2. Connect — One app, 128 device types, unlimited properties
  3. Learn — AI observes patterns, begins optimizing
  4. Save — 20-30% energy reduction with ROI tracking

SLIDE 6: Product Ecosystem

Headline: 128 Products. 15 Categories. Complete Control.

Category Grid (show 8 categories with icons):

CategoryProducts
Climate Control14
Security19
Energy Management12
Lighting18
Access Control13
Sensors13
Curtains/Shades29
Gateways4

SLIDE 7: Competitive Advantage

Headline: Why HeyZack Wins

Comparison Table:

DimensionTraditional BMSConsumerHeyZack
Cost/Building$85,000$2,000$5,000
Portfolio ScaleLimitedNoneUnlimited
AI LearningNoNoYes
DIY InstallNoYesYes
Vendor Lock-inHighMediumNone

Highlight HeyZack column in brand blue.

SLIDE 8: Traction

Headline: Proven Results

Key Metrics (large numbers):

  • 128 products launched
  • 16 languages supported
  • 20-30% energy savings verified
  • 95% cost reduction achieved

Testimonial:

“Deployed across 30 buildings in 6 weeks. Energy costs down 28%.”

SLIDE 9: Business Model

Headline: Hardware + SaaS + Services

Revenue Streams (4 items):

  1. Hardware Sales — 50% margin
  2. Cloud Services — 80% margin
  3. Enterprise Support — 70% margin
  4. Partner Program — 60% margin

Unit Economics:

  • LTV: $15,000
  • CAC: $800
  • LTV:CAC: 18.75x

SLIDE 10: Go-to-Market

Headline: Land, Expand, Dominate

3 Phases (timeline):

  • Year 1: Mid-market property managers, 500 buildings
  • Year 2-3: Partner program, hospitality vertical, 5,000 buildings
  • Year 4+: Enterprise accounts, international expansion

SLIDE 11: Team

Headline: Built by Industry Veterans

Team Members (4 people with titles and credentials):

  • CEO — 15 years PropTech experience
  • CTO — Former Big Tech, AI/ML expert
  • COO — Scaled company $5M to $80M
  • VP Sales — Built enterprise sales teams

Include placeholder for professional headshots.

SLIDE 12: The Ask

Headline: Join Us in Transforming Building Automation

Investment Ask: $15M Series A

Use of Funds (pie chart or bars):

  • 40% Product & Engineering
  • 35% Sales & Marketing
  • 15% Operations
  • 10% G&A

Contact: invest@heyzack.ai | heyzack.ai

Use gradient background for this closing slide.

Formatting Rules

  1. One message per slide — Don’t overload
  2. Headlines under 8 words — Punchy and memorable
  3. Max 4 bullets per slide — Respect attention spans
  4. Large numbers for data — 72px+ for key stats
  5. Consistent colors — Blue for trust, pink for action
  6. Whitespace — At least 20% of each slide should be empty

Tone & Voice

  • Confident but not arrogant
  • Data-driven — Every claim has a number
  • Professional — This is a business pitch, not a product demo
  • Urgent — The market opportunity is now
